item.title: Novo Nordisk High-Dose Wegovy Launch
item.description:
• Summary: Novo Nordisk has launched a high-dose formulation of Wegovy (semaglutide) in the US, offering a new option for weight management with potentially improved efficacy. The launch underscores the growing market for GLP-1 agonists in obesity and metabolic disorders.
  • MoAs: Wegovy (semaglutide) is a glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonist that mimics incretin hormones to increase insulin secretion, decrease glucagon release, slow gastric emptying, and promote satiety, leading to weight loss and glycemic control.
  • Sources: STAT News, Endpoints News
